item.description: Tool for the creation, validation and transfer of neuroscience project folders.

item.title: cdeust/Cortex
item.description: Persistent memory for Claude Code — 41 neuroscience papers, 26 biological mechanisms with paper-bearing per-mechanism ablation evidence (E1 v3). LongMemEval R@10 98.4% / MRR 0.9124 (n=500). LoCoMo R@10 94.2% / MRR 0.8278 (n=1986). BEAM-10M
